text: A blurry fake-ID image was run through facial recognition and returned Nijeer Parks as a possible match. Police allegedly obtained a warrant without adequately verifying alibi evidence or disclosing the uncertainty of the technology.
ai_system_name: Clearview AI alleged / out-of-state facial-recognition lead
deployer: Woodbridge Police Department and intelligence-center intermediaries
canonical_source_conflicted: Actual suspect identity, alibi evidence, and warrant probable-cause standards
mitigation_gap: No adequate alibi check, DNA/fingerprint corroboration, or transparent disclosure of FRT provenance before arrest.
reliance_or_harm: Parks spent about 10 days in jail before charges were dismissed; civil-rights litigation followed.
